components.name: AppLayout
components.responsibilities: Main layout shell with background, max-width container, print header

components.name: AuthGate
components.responsibilities: Loading spinner, login/signup form, guest mode button. Wraps children when authenticated.

components.name: AppHeader
components.props: { auth, activeUserId, stats, assigneeStats, syncStatus, onExport, onImport, fileInputRef }
components.responsibilities: Renders MobileHeader or DesktopHeader based on breakpoint

components.name: MobileHeader
components.props: { auth, stats, syncStatus, onExport, onImport, fileInputRef }
components.responsibilities: Compact mobile header with branding, action buttons, stats row, progress bar

components.name: DesktopHeader
components.props: { auth, activeUserId, stats, assigneeStats, syncStatus, onExport, onImport, fileInputRef }
components.responsibilities: Full desktop header with branding badge, title, stat cards, session card, sync status, ring chart, team panel, action buttons

components.name: StatsCards
components.responsibilities: Three stat cards: Total, Completed, Completion Rate

components.name: DayGrid
components.props: { data, plan hooks, dragEnabled, sensors, handleDragEnd }
components.responsibilities: DnD context wrapper + responsive grid of DaySection components

components.name: PerformanceSection
components.responsibilities: Performance summary with progress bar (desktop only)
